allow: PowerShell(Set-Location D:\\CODING\\UNFOLD; Get-ChildItem publish -Name | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\.exe$' }; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem publish -Directory | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(Set-Location D:\\CODING\\UNFOLD; Get-Item publish/v0.0.2.C/4H-Unfolder.exe | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})

PowerShell(cd D:\\CODING\\UNFOLD; $proc = Start-Process "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --project src/FourHUnfolder.App --no-build -c Release" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \($proc.HasExited\) { "EXITED with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" } else { "RUNNING OK"; $proc.Kill\(\) })

PowerShell(cd D:\\CODING\\UNFOLD; Start-Process dotnet -ArgumentList "run --project src/FourHUnfolder.App --no-build" -PassThru | ForEach-Object { Start-Sleep 5; if \(!$_.HasExited\) { $_.Kill\(\); "App started OK \(PID $\($_.Id\) killed\)" } else { "App exited with code $\($_.ExitCode\)" } })
